title: Greater control on notification settings
excerpt: My team works odd hours. I only want team members to receive notifications during the hours when they’re working. Currently, I can “mute” a board so that it doesn’t send notifications, which is great as a catch all solut…

posts.author: nickwendowski (Nick Wendowski)
posts.cookedHtml:
My team works odd hours. I only want team members to receive notifications during the hours when they’re working. Currently, I can “mute” a board so that it doesn’t send notifications, which is great as a catch all solution If I never want them to receive the notification, but not effective for each individual.

Dream Feature: Allow the admin or the team member, to customize the days and times in which Monday sends notifications to specific people. Or at least allow the admin to “send notification during working hours only” as a global or per-board setting.
